calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-31-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change of a minor and name of petitioner.

Dept. 514, Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Clerk: S.Vantree, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840

Petitioner Liyun Li present and sworn and examined.
Minying Luo sworn in as Cantonese interpreter for petitioner.
Proof of Publication on file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor from Han Tian Wu to Tim Wu, and the name of the petitioner from Liyun Li to Vivian Yun Li.

Decree Changing Name signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-29-2014 Reset To Jul-31-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry Dorfman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840
Petitioner Liyun Li mother of minor present in court.
Petitioner Sworn and examined through Cantonese Interpreter Xue Hong Xie.
No other appearances on the matter.

Proof of Publication on file.

Petitioner to bring documents and proposed order from Access Center waiving any further notice to father by July 17, 2014 to Department 514. The petition is continued to July 31, 2014 at 9:00 am for further hearing. Petitioner and Cantonese interpreter are ordered present.
